response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with genuine developer-tooling experience (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators, device orchestration tools) and some mobile exposure, but this is a Level II people-management role requiring at least 2 years of people management and 3 years of technical leadership. The resume shows no direct reports, no performance management, and no organizational-change leadership; the closest signals are founding a small open-source project and running workshops. The technical depth is real, but the core management requirements of the role are unmet.
strengths: Hands-on developer-tools track record: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/GitLab infrastructure, and MCP code generators
15+ years of broad software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, exceeding the 8-year minimum
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, Selenium courses, and coding dojos
concerns: No people-management experience: no evidence of direct reports, one-on-ones, or performance management
No formal technical leadership role such as tech lead or staff-level org influence over other engineers' work
Mobile-platform experience is dated (iOS/Apple TV circa 2015-2016) and not at the ecosystem/build-system scale the role targets

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
No organizational leadership or roadmap ownership
